metadata.description: Pools all JRN measurements from 7 experiments across 4 datasets (rel-f1, rel-stack, rel-avito, rel-hm), builds a predictive model of JRN probe reliability, decomposes meta-analytic heterogeneity, and derives practitioner-facing decision rules.
metadata.decision_rule_text:
|--- log_mean_fanout <= 3.8081
|   |--- log_mean_fanout <= 3.5435
|   |   |--- class: 1
|   |--- log_mean_fanout >  3.5435
|   |   |--- class: 1
|--- log_mean_fanout >  3.8081
|   |--- jrn_magnitude <= 0.6668
|   |   |--- class: 0
|   |--- jrn_magnitude >  0.6668
|   |   |--- class: 0
metadata.decision_tree_text:
|--- log_mean_fanout <= 2.8539
|   |--- jrn_magnitude <= 0.2824
|   |   |--- log_mean_fanout <= 1.0375
|   |   |   |--- class: 3
|   |   |--- log_mean_fanout >  1.0375
|   |   |   |--- class: 4
|   |--- jrn_magnitude >  0.2824
|   |   |--- class: 3
|--- log_mean_fanout >  2.8539
|   |--- log_mean_fanout <= 3.5770
|   |   |--- class: 2
|   |--- log_mean_fanout >  3.5770
|   |   |--- jrn_magnitude <= 0.6714
|   |   |   |--- class: 4
|   |   |--- jrn_magnitude >  0.6714
|   |   |   |--- class: 2
